daily.today_energy: You're giving main character energy today, Scorpio. The universe is hinting at a subtle shift—trust your gut when something feels off. Your intuition is literally your superpower rn.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, there's an invitation to go deeper (emotionally, not just physically). Single? Someone's been noticing you from afar. Either way, authenticity is your love language today.
daily.career: Your strategic mind is peaked. This is the day to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or have that conversation you've been avoiding. Your words carry weight—use them intentionally.
daily.health: Your body's asking for grounding. Whether that's a walk, meditation, or just unplugging from your phone, honor that call. You've been running on fumes; today's about refueling your energy.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about releasing what no longer serves you. Venus is nudging you toward honest conversations and authentic connections. Trust your gut—it's been right before and it will be again. Time to level up.
weekly.love: Someone might be trying to get your attention, but also check in with yourself first. Single or coupled, this is about knowing your worth and not settling for surface-level vibes. Real connection is coming if you stay true.
weekly.career: Your ideas have serious potential rn. This is the week to pitch, propose, or start that thing you've been sitting on. The energy supports bold moves and creative problem-solving. Your reputation is elevating quietly—trust the process.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more intentional rest, not just scrolling in bed. Whether it's stretching, walks, or actually sleeping, tune in to what recharges you. Mental clarity follows when you honor your physical needs without guilt.
